Release Notes for Projects of X-CUBE-53L9A1 Package

Copyright © 2026 STMicroelectronics

Purpose

The X-CUBE-53L9A1 projects are a set of sample applications that aim to explain and provide use cases showcasing the features of the VL53L9CX sensor.

They are delivered with preconfigured projects for the main supported toolchains. Projects include STM32CubeMX project file (.ioc) for the graphical visualization of the STM32 microcontroller pins, peripherals configuration.

For further information regarding the supported products please refer to:

  • VL53L9CX on st.com

Update history

Main changes

First release

Headline
Add 53L9A1_PostprocessSingle application for NUCLEO-H563ZI

Contents

Projects

Board Name readme
NUCLEO-H563ZI 53L9A1_PostprocessSingle README.md

Known limitations

Headline
The 53L9A1_PostprocessSingle application doesn’t behave as expected with ARM Keil when CONF_PRINT_FRAME flag is enabled with Ofast compiler flag.
A compilation warning is triggered when building projects with STM32Cube when -Ofast optimization flag set.

Development toolchains and compilers

  • IAR System Workbench V9.60.3
  • ARM Keil V5.38
  • STM32CubeIDE v2.0.0

Supported devices and boards

  • NUCLEO-H563ZI rev. MB1404C
  • X-NUCLEO-53L9A1 / VL53L9CX

Backward compatibility

N/A

Dependencies

This projects release is compatible with:

  • STM32CubeHAL H5 V1.5.0

For complete documentation on STM32Cube Expansion Packages , visit: STM32Cube Expansion Packages

Info
